---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: projects
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 3          # cards per row
  image-height: 200px      # thumbnail height
  categories: true         # show a clickable tag cloud / filter
  sort-ui: true            # let visitors re-sort
  filter-ui: true          # add a search box
  fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
---
